## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor (code change with no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build / CI change

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? What did you test? -->

- [ ] Tested locally on <!-- Windows / macOS / Linux -->
- [ ] Existing tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Frontend builds cleanly (`npm run build` in `app/frontend/`)
- [ ] No regressions in related features

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] Code follows the project style (gofmt for Go, ESLint for TypeScript)
- [ ] No debug code, `console.log`, or commented-out blocks left in
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated (README, CHANGELOG, inline comments if needed)
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly described above
